case_title: IN RE: RALPH MATHEW ANICETE et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ANICETE, PERLINA GUINTU JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (THE SAN FRANCISCO BAY GUARDIAN)
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2002 ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: YVONNE LEE.

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on petition changing name. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Yvonne Lee. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The petition filed is defective and the Court took the matter off calendar.
